metadata.model: World Cup match model: raw team strength + tournament context + market/external calibration

metadata.data_warning: Seed data is illustrative and not an official 2026 team list, draw, injury feed, or live market snapshot. Bosnia and Herzegovina uses a temporary transparent estimate until live ratings are imported.
